User.title: User
User.description: Admin users with specific rights in the clinic inventory system.

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

role.description: The role of the admin: super_admin or standard admin with permissions.

permissions.description: List of categories this admin is authorized to edit. If empty or not set, standard admins cannot edit anything.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Dynmaic category definitions like Médical, Cuisine, Ménage, Entretien.

id.description: Category document ID or name slug.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: A product item stored in the inventory.

category.description: Category name or dynamic Category ID this product belongs to.

minQuantity.description: Minimum alert limit before stock is flagged as low/rupture.

Supplier.title: Supplier
Supplier.description: Holds the supplier contact info associated with a product. Access strictly restricted to Super Admins.

productId.description: Document ID matching the respective product.

contacts.description: Array of contacts, each containing name and phone number.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection mapping authenticated admins to roles and category rights.

/products/{productId}.description: Clinic inventory products with name, stock, category.

/suppliers/{productId}.description: Locked collection containing supplier phone numbers. Visible only to super_admin roles.
